steps.text: Guardrails block dangerous operations before they reach your servers. Example: prevent 'DROP TABLE' commands or operations on production databases.
Select which argument to check. Use '*' to scan all arguments recursively, or pick a specific field from your tool's schema.

Pick a match type and enter the pattern. 'contains' matches case-insensitive substrings ('DROP TABLE'), 'equals' requires an exact match, 'regex' matches a regular expression ('.*DELETE.*'). Tool calls matching this pattern will be rejected.
Set a clear error message that the AI will see when blocked. Example: 'Cannot operate on production database'.
Click 'Add Guardrail' to save. Test it in 'Try It Out' below - dangerous calls are now blocked with your custom message!
